exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.savageTip: Tuck elbows at 45 degrees. Squeeze glutes. Full range of motion.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.savageTip: Plant your feet, arch your back slightly, explode up.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.savageTip: Keep the bar close to your shins. Drive through the floor.

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.savageTip: Drop low. If it doesn't burn, you're just stretching.
